title: Amtech N0155 Lockable Toolbox, Weather-Resistant and Waterproof Storage Case with Twin Locking Points and 4Kg / 4.7L Capacity (Pack of 3)
features: The information below is per-pack only
The information below applies to each unit in the pack
The Amtech weather resistant storage case can be used to hoard a variety of tools or valuables, thanks to its 4.7 Litre capacity and twin locking points.
The toolbox is manufactured from a durable moulded polypropylene and is waterproof throughout.
This 12 inch (290mm) hinged lockable tool box also features twin locking points and can be conveniently stacked if using multiple cases.
Note: This tool organiser has a 4kg (4.7 litre) capacity.
